figures.caption: Fig. 1 Complementary comparison of representative models using MRR@10 across the JUÁ datasets. This plot emphasizes the quality of early-hit ranking and makes the strong effect of domain adaptation on JUÁ-Juris more visible.

Fig. 3 Complementary comparison of representative models using Recall@10 across the JUÁ datasets. Recall@10 highlights differences in top-10 coverage, especially on the legislative and normative subsets.

Fig. 2 Complementary comparison of representative models using MAP@10 across the JUÁ datasets. MAP@10 highlights quality across the full top-10 ranking rather than only the position of the first relevant document.
